name: the review queue routes a low-confidence (all-fallback) rule to side-by-side review
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-fb --tool semgrep --prose 'Tenants must be isolated across regions for resilience.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rule=g-fb confidence=low .* queue=side-by-side-review' e.txt && echo side-by-side 1>&2
